mentions.note: High-growth but hasn't blown doors off; retail hurt by war; can't recommend buying until war ends.

Sold off 50% from $48 peak despite solid fundamentals: 6.5% revenue growth, 30% EBITDA growth, 84% sticky auto-ship. Guidance bullish (8–9% FY growth). Stock at 17x earnings—cheapest valuation ever. Secular e-commerce shift and market-share gains should drive re-rating; yesterday's 13% bounce is beginning of larger rally.
Down from $48 to low-$20s on weak guidance; good company but bad stock; beat on earnings last report; watch for next guidance.
